title: coaching — subprocessors
description: The Coaching module itself engages ZERO third-party subprocessors — every state transition happens within the Academorix platform. Downstream: notifications module dispatches coaching notifications; storage module (Wave 4+) stores signed certification documents + coach photos. Wave 4+ optional integration with issuing-body verification APIs is subprocessor-relevant when introduced.

downstream_subprocessors_referenced.used_for: Dispatching CoachingProfileCreated / CoachingProfileVerified / CoachCertificationExpiringSoon / CoachCertificationExpired / CoachAssignmentCreated / CoachAssignmentEndingSoon / CoachSkillRatingRecorded notifications via mail / SMS / push channels.
Signed URL storage for photo_url_signed (CoachingProfile) + document_url (CoachCertification). 7-year retention aligned with cert compliance window.

notes: GDPR Art. 30 requires this record even when empty.

Adding a subprocessor (e.g. USSF / NASM / Red Cross API for automated certification verification) requires: update this file + refresh compliance.json Art. 28 + notify tenants on the subprocessor list at least 30 days before launch.
